calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Jun-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-30-2025 Continued To Jul-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared via zoom for Leo Bautista (petitioner).

Ms. Navia requested a brief continuance, that she will file the second interim accounting today, and that there has been a delay due to the learning of a long-lost son, and that he is incarcerated in some institution unknown to them. The matter is continued to July 28, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rowena Navia for Leo Bautista, Petitioner and Administrator (via Zoom).
Robert Ignacio, decedent's son, is present in court.

Ms. Navia reported that prior attempts to contact the decedent's spouse, Benny Ignacio, including through his friend/attorney Warner Berry, have been unsuccessful. Robert Ignacio stated that his father was aware of the petition but had personal plans and was unable and unwilling to attend the hearing. Mr. Ignacio provided his father's phone number for Ms. Navia to contact him and further explain the situation. The court took the petition under submission with intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close
Off Calendar Oct-21-2024 Continued To Oct-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Continued To Oct-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristina Lam appeared by zoom for personal representative.

Mrs. Lam stated that Benny and his attorney have not been communitive or cooperative with regard to his election share, that they did not have much information on the issue of the decedent's additional son and requested a four-month continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to October 21, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court expressed concern about the son, stated that he may lack capacity to receive a share of the estate, that the inventory and appraisal may have to be corrected and that Mrs. Lam will have to file a petition under Probate Code 12200.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kristina Lam appearing via zoom for Leo F. Bautista (petitioner).
Warner Berry appearing in person for Benny Ignacio (husband) and Robert Ignacio (son).

Mr. Berry stated no objections to the petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Leo F. Bautista is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $193,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Continued To Jun-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for Leo Bautista (special administrator).
Warner Berry specially appearing for and with Benny Ignacio (decedent's spouse).

Mr. Berry stated that Benny needs an attorney, but he is not sure it would be wise for him to take this on if it is going to be a full-blown proceeding. Mrs. Navia stated that she filed the petition because Mr. Bautista was the decedent's conservator, that they need to close out the conservatorship, and that they attempted to contact the family, but they did not get back to her. Mrs. Navia also stated that bills need to be paid to close the conservatorship and to move forward, that a petition for a special administrator was granted, and that Mr. Bautista is in the best position to close out this estate. Discussion was held regarding the assets being just liquid assets, the property where Benny resides being held in joint tenancy when Mrs. Ignacio passed away, and Benny needing to do something to transfer the property. The court explained the purpose of the petition, the process, and Mrs. Navia and Mr. Bautista roles. Mr. Berry stated that he can help with transfer of the property. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to June 5, 2023 at 9;00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The special letters are extended to June 5, 2023. Any objections or competing petition are to be filed before May 22, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Continued To May-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristina Lam appeared by zoom for and with Leo Bautista by zoom.
Warner Berry appeared for and with Benny Ignacio.

Mr. Berry stated that Benny is his friend, and he is here to see where things are. The court noted that Benny and Robert have a higher priority to serve, but it does not see any declinations to serve. Mr. Berry stated that his friend (Benny) would prefer to be involved. Mrs. Lam stated that they made multiple attempts to contact the son and husband, that they never heard back, and that there were several calls and voicemails. Mr. Berry stated that he will have to find someone to represent Benny, and that it sounds like letters would have to be applied for on Benny's behalf. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to May 1, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the parties to speak with Mr. Bautista.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
